review_text: They deliver bad quality veggies and even if you raise an issue, there is no reply. App is buggy and many features do not work, like raising a ticket. And out of stock items proce is calculated in cart.
summary: The grocery app delivers bad quality vegetables and has buggy features with poor customer service.

review_text: According to the App, is Service unavailable. So App is not working.
summary: Grocery app reports service unavailability and app malfunction.

review_text: While deleting the items in the cart, the list does not get refreshed right away
summary: The grocery app's shopping cart does not refresh properly when deleting items.

review_text: Great place to order organic and mindful fruits vegetables and daily needs with affordable price
summary: Great place for ordering organic and mindful fruits, vegetables, and daily needs at affordable prices.

review_text: Pathetic interface. No corrections are made despite repeatedly calling or messaging them myself and telling them about bugs on the app. Not able to order anything on app since 2 weeks now. But they don't care and they don't change anything
summary: The grocery app has a terrible interface with persistent bugs, causing issues for over two weeks and no improvement from the company.

review_text: They always miss items or deliver dated products if you don't check each one. This has happened thrice with me. Uninstalling this app.
summary: The grocery app frequently delivers incorrect or expired items, leading to uninstallation.

review_text: Really impressed with this new app which is super smooth and easy payment options. I would recommend this to all my friends and family members
summary: The grocery app is smooth, easy to use with good payment options.
